scripts.allure:clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path allure-results) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-results }; if (Test-Path allure-report) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force allure-report }"
scripts.test:backend:allure: backend\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest backend\analytics backend\authentication backend\blog backend\comics backend\interactions backend\users --alluredir allure-results
scripts.test:allure: yarn allure:clean && yarn test:backend:allure && yarn test:frontend:unit:allure && yarn test:frontend:e2e:allure && yarn lighthouse:import
